texto: If I am disobeying orders, I'd rather be with God against men than with men against God.
autor: Aristides de Souza Mendes do Amaral e Abranches
explicacao: Citação de Aristides de Souza Mendes do Amaral e Abranches sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “If I am disobeying orders, I'd rather be with God against men than with men against God.” articula reflexao, morality, against em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
